data.content: Planning completed for fc07. Relevant implementation surface is `src/components/retakes-view.tsx`, with optional extraction into `src/lib/beat-sort.ts` and regression coverage in `src/lib/__tests__/beat-sort.test.ts` or a dedicated ReTakes contract test. Important nuance: the current checkout already includes an inline `updated`-descending sort in ReTakes, so implementation should first verify the reported disorder on the actual worktree/base and then harden or centralize the comparator plus tests rather than assume the sort is absent.
